name: Simulating Students or Sycophantic Problem Solving? On Misconception Faithfulness of LLM Simulators
summary: arXiv preprint evaluating misconception faithfulness in LLM simulated students across seven instruction-tuned LLMs, multiple datasets, and prompting strategies.

access_attempts.notes: arXiv PDF was downloaded and text-extracted for model list, SFS metric, Table 3 flip-rate results, SFT/DPO/GRPO results, and limitations.
